meta.title: SILKORA TRAVEL — Premium journeys around the world
meta.description: Tours across the world and along the Great Silk Road. Tailor-made itineraries, the finest hotels, 24/7 support. AI planner for your personal journey.

about.title: Luxury travel — without the hassle
about.body: SILKORA TRAVEL is a team that turns travel dreams into flawlessly organised trips. We know our destinations from the inside, partner with the finest hotels and stay by your side on every mile of the way.

1.name: Dilnoza A.
1.text: They organised our honeymoon in the Maldives perfectly — from the flight to a sunset dinner. We didn't have to think about a thing.

2.name: Sergey M.
2.text: The best Silk Road tour! Guide, hotels, itinerary — everything was top-notch. Thank you, SILKORA.

3.name: Kamola R.
3.text: 24/7 support is not just words. They rebooked our flight in the middle of the night. Highly recommend.

ctaBanner.text: Discover the world with SILKORA TRAVEL

contact.title: Ready to set off?
contact.subtitle: Leave a request — we'll find the perfect tour and answer all your questions.
contact.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.
contact.error: Sending failed. Please try later or message us on Telegram.
contact.policy: Free consultation. Cancellation & refund terms are confirmed with your manager at booking.
